publicSideBand: No direct charge in city-planned replacement projects
privateSideBand: No direct charge in city-planned replacement projects
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement is described as no cost to property owners in city-funded project areas
housingTypeAssumption: Duluth publishes no-cost replacement language for planned projects instead of bid ranges
permitAssumption: Eligibility depends on city project selection and a signed work agreement
restorationAssumption: Restoration is handled through the city-led construction project scope
methodologySummary: Duluth ties the no-cost statement to funded city-planned replacement projects and explicitly disallows outside reimbursement so the page reflects project-funded eligibility rather than an open-ended market estimate.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid direct cost only when the address is selected for a city-led project and the owner signs the work agreement before the replacement enters the construction schedule.
